debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
⊢ map (fun ω => u \ X ω) P = @ProbabilityTheory.bernoulliOn ι u (unitInterval.symm p)

failed_attempts:
by
    simpa [IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn_eq_map] using hX.map_eq

by
    classical
    ext S hS
    have hsubset : ∀ᵐ s ∂Ber(u, p), s ⊆ u := bernoulliOn_ae_subset (u := u) (p := p)
    have hpre :
        (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S =
          (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S ∩ {s : Set ι | s ⊆ u} := by
        ext s
        constructor
        · intro hs
          refine ⟨hs, ?_⟩
          by_cases hu : s ⊆ u
          · exact hu
          · exfalso
            have : u \ s ⊆ u := by intro x hx; exact hx.1
            have : s ⊆ u := by
              intro x hx
              by_contra hx'
              have : x ∈ u \ s := ⟨hx', hx⟩
              have : x ∈ u := (this).1
              exact hx' this
            exact hu this
        · intro hs
          exact hs.1
    have hmap1 : map (fun ω ↦ u \ X ω) P S = map X P ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S) := by
      simp [Measure.map_apply, hS, MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable, Set.preimage_preimage]
    have hmap2 :
        map X P ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S) =
          Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S) := by
      simpa [IsBernoulliOn, HasLaw] using congrArg (fun μ ↦ μ ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S)) hX.map_eq
    have hmap3 :
        Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S) =
          Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S ∩ {s : Set ι | s ⊆ u}) := by
      have : Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S \ {s : Set ι | s ⊆ u}) = 0 := by
        have hnull : Ber(u, p) ({s : Set ι | ¬ s ⊆ u}) = 0 := by
          simpa [ae_iff] using hsubset
        have hle : (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S \ {s : Set ι | s ⊆ u} ⊆ {s : Set ι | ¬ s ⊆ u} := by
          intro s hs
          exact hs.2
        exact measure_mono_null hle hnull
      have hadd :=
        measure_inter_add_diff ((μ := Ber(u, p)) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S)) ({s : Set ι | s ⊆ u})
      have : Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S) =
          Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S ∩ {s : Set ι | s ⊆ u}) +
            Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S \ {s : Set ι | s ⊆ u}) := by
        simpa [Set.inter_comm] using (hadd.symm)
      simpa [this, this] using (by simpa [this] using congrArg (fun t ↦ t) this)
    have hpush :
        Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S ∩ {s : Set ι | s ⊆ u}) =
          Ber(u, σ p) S := by
      -- use singleton formula on finite approximations? fallback to simp via `bernoulliOn_eq_map`
      simpa [bernoulliOn_eq_map, Measure.map_apply, hS, MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable] 
    calc
      map (fun ω ↦ u \ X ω) P S
          = map X P ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S) := hmap1
      _ = Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S) := hmap2
      _ = Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S ∩ {s : Set ι | s ⊆ u}) := hmap3
      _ = Ber(u, σ p) S := hpush

by
    classical
    simpa [bernoulliOn_eq_map] using congrArg (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s)) hX.map_eq

by
    classical
    simpa [IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn_eq_map, Set.ext_iff, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_setOf_eq,
      and_left_comm, and_assoc, and_comm] using
      congrArg (Measure.map fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) hX.map_eq

by
    simpa [IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn_eq_map, Measure.map_map, Function.comp]
      using congrArg (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s)) hX.map_eq

by
    classical
    -- `u \ X ω` corresponds to `a ↦ a ∈ u ∧ ¬ (a ∈ X ω)`
    -- On the law side, this is the pointwise complement on coordinates in `u`,
    -- which swaps `p` and `σ p`.
    have hmap : Measure.map (fun ω ↦ u \ X ω) P =
        Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ {a | a ∈ u ∧ a ∉ s}) (Measure.map X P) := by
      ext S hS
      simp [Measure.map_apply, hS, Set.preimage, Set.image]
    -- Use `HasLaw` of `X` and transport through the measurable map.
    simpa [ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn, HasLaw, hmap] using congrArg (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ {a | a ∈ u ∧ a ∉ s})) hX.map_eq

by
    classical
    have hXmap : map X P = Ber(u, p) := hX.map_eq
    have hsubset : ∀ᵐ s ∂Ber(u, p), s ⊆ u := bernoulliOn_ae_subset (u := u) (p := p)
    have hcomp : (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ∘ X = fun ω ↦ u \ X ω := rfl
    have hmapcomp :
        map (fun ω ↦ u \ X ω) P = map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) (map X P) := by
      simpa [hcomp] using (Measure.map_map (f := X) (g := fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) P).symm
    have hmap' :
        map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) (Ber(u, p)) = Ber(u, σ p) := by
      ext S hS
      have hpre :
          (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S =
            (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S ∩ {s | s ⊆ u} := by
        refine (Set.eq_of_subset_of_subset ?_ ?_)
        · intro s hs
          refine ⟨hs, ?_⟩
          exact Set.sdiff_subset _ _
        · intro s hs; exact hs.1
      have hpre2 :
          Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S) =
            Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S ∩ {s | s ⊆ u}) := by
        rw [hpre]
      have hpre3 :
          Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S ∩ {s | s ⊆ u}) =
            Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S) := by
        symm
        rw [← Measure.inter_eq_left]
        · exact hsubset
        · exact hS
      rw [Measure.map_apply (by
          -- measurability of `fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s` follows from set-theoretic equivalence
          -- available via `MeasurableEquiv.setOf`
          fun_prop) hS]
      -- use `bernoulliOn_eq_map` and push-forward through complement on `{i | _}`
      -- by rewriting both sides as maps of the same product measure
      simp [bernoulliOn_eq_map, Measure.map_map, Set.diff_eq, Set.compl_def, Set.setOf_app_iff]
    simpa [hXmap, hmapcomp, hmap']

by
    classical
    have hsubset : ∀ᵐ s ∂Ber(u, p), s ⊆ u := bernoulliOn_ae_subset (u := u) (p := p)
    have hcomp : (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ∘ (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) =ᵐ[Ber(u, p)] fun s ↦ s := by
      filter_upwards [hsubset] with s hs
      ext i
      by_cases hi : i ∈ u <;> simp [Set.mem_diff, hi, hs hi]
    have hmap_invol :
        Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) (Ber(u, p))) =
          Ber(u, p) := by
      simpa [Measure.map_map] using congrArg (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s))
        (Measure.map_congr hcomp)
    have hmap_symm :
        Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) (Ber(u, p)) = Ber(u, σ p) := by
      ext S hS
      have :
          (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) (Ber(u, p))) S =
            Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) ⁻¹' S) := by
        simp [Measure.map_apply, hS]
      simp [this, bernoulliOn_apply', Set.preimage_preimage] at *
    simpa [IsBernoulliOn, HasLaw] using (hX.map_eq.trans hmap_symm)

    simpa [IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn, Set.diff_eq, and_left_comm, and_assoc, and_comm, unitInterval.symm_symm,

by
    classical
    have hsubset : ∀ᵐ s ∂Ber(u, p), s ⊆ u := bernoulliOn_ae_subset (u := u) (p := p)
    have hsdiff :
        (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) =ᵐ[Ber(u, p)] (fun s ↦ u \ (u \ s)) := by
      filter_upwards [hsubset] with s hs
      simp [Set.diff_diff, Set.inter_eq_right.2 hs]
    have hcomap :
        (Ber(u, p)).map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) =
          (Ber(u, p)).map (fun s ↦ u \ (u \ s)) := by
      exact Measure.map_congr hsdiff
    have :
        map (fun ω ↦ u \ X ω) P = (Ber(u, p)).map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) := by
      simpa [IsBernoulliOn, HasLaw] using congrArg (fun μ ↦ μ.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s)) hX.map_eq
    have hsdiff2 :
        (Ber(u, p)).map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ (u \ s)) = Ber(u, σ p) := by
      simpa [bernoulliOn_eq_map] using (congrArg (Measure.map (fun f : ι → Prop ↦ {a | f a}))
        (show
          (infinitePi fun i ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False).map
              (fun f i ↦ (i ∈ u) ∧ ¬ f i) =
            infinitePi fun i ↦ toNNReal (σ p) • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ (σ p)) • dirac False from by
              ext s hs
              simpa [infinitePi, hs, Measure.map_apply, MeasurableSet.preimage, Set.preimage, and_left_comm,
                and_assoc, and_comm] ))
    calc
      map (fun ω ↦ u \ X ω) P
          = (Ber(u, p)).map (fun s : Set ι ↦ u \ s) := this
      _ = (Ber(u, p)).map (fun s ↦ u \ (u \ s)) := hcomap
      _ = Ber(u, σ p) := hsdiff2
